auth.tagline: Kuɗin da ke shiga, kuɗin da ke fita — koyaushe a bayyane.

errors.passwordMismatch: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba
errors.unauthorized: Ba a ba da izini ba
errors.notFound: Ba a sami abin da ake nema ba
errors.serverError: Kuskuren uwar garke. Sake gwadawa daga baya.

landing.heroTitle: Kuɗin da ke shiga, kuɗin da ke fita — koyaushe a bayyane.
landing.heroSub: Moneytracer kayan aiki ne na lissafin kuɗi ga ƙananan kasuwanci, ƙungiyoyin ajiyar kuɗi na al'umma, da kashe kuɗin kai. Bi diddigin tallace-tallace da kaya, gudanar da gudummawar ƙungiyar ku, ko sarrafa kasafin kuɗin ku — duka daga wuri ɗaya mai sauƙi.
landing.businessFeaturesTitle: Duk abin da ƙaramin kasuwanci ke buƙata don bin diddigin kuɗinsa
landing.businessFeaturesSub: Daga kanti zuwa ma'auni, Moneytracer yana tsara tallace-tallace, kaya, da kwararar kuɗin ku ba tare da takardun lissafi ba.
landing.communityFeaturesTitle: An yi shi don ƙungiyoyin ajiya da bankin al'umma
landing.communityFeaturesSub: Daina rubuta gudummawa a littafi. Moneytracer yana ba ƙungiyar ku bayanan da duk mambobi za su iya amincewa da su.
landing.personalFeaturesTitle: Kashe kuɗi cikin hikima, ba tare da takardun lissafi ba
landing.personalFeaturesSub: Rubuta kashe kuɗi cikin daƙiƙu, ka san abin da ya kamata a kashe yau, kuma inganta halayenka na kashe kuɗi.

businessFeatures.title: Wurin Sayarwa
businessFeatures.text: Sauri da inganci wajen sayar da kaya masu yawa tare da tabbatar da kaya kai tsaye.

businessFeatures.title: Kayayyaki
businessFeatures.text: Bi diddigin matakan kaya, shigo da kaya da yawa, da samun faɗakarwa kafin kaya su ƙare.

businessFeatures.title: Kudirorin Biya da Bayanan Farashi
businessFeatures.text: Aika kudirorin biya da bayanan farashi na ƙwararru, kuma juya bayanan farashin da aka karɓa zuwa tallace-tallace.

businessFeatures.title: Masu Bin Bashi da Masu Bashi
businessFeatures.text: San wanda ke bin ka bashi da wanda kake bin bashi, cikin dubawa ɗaya.

businessFeatures.title: Rahotanni
businessFeatures.text: Riba da hasara, taƙaitaccen kuɗi, da ƙimar kayayyaki — koyaushe na yanzu.

businessFeatures.title: Rijistar Ayyuka
businessFeatures.text: Cikakkiyar rijistar wanda ya yi me, don kada wani abu ya wuce ba a lura da shi ba.

communityFeatures.title: Sarrafa Mambobi
communityFeatures.text: Ƙara mambobi, ba da izinin masu rubutu tare, da ba mambobi shigarsu ta karantawa kawai.

communityFeatures.title: Gudummawa
communityFeatures.text: Rubuta gudummawar ajiya na kowane mamba kuma ka ga jimillar ƙungiya na sabuntawa nan take.

communityFeatures.title: Biyan Kuɗi
communityFeatures.text: Bi diddigin biyan kuɗi na juyawa ko rabon riba daidai, tare da cikakken tarihi ga kowane mamba.

communityFeatures.title: Bashin Ƙungiya
communityFeatures.text: Bada bashi ga mambobi daga ajiyar ƙungiya kuma bi diddigin biyan bashin daidai.

communityFeatures.title: Taƙaitaccen Ƙungiya
communityFeatures.text: Dubawa mai bayyanan jimillar ajiya, bashin da ke fitowa, da lafiyar ƙungiya — ga kowane taro.

communityFeatures.title: Izinin Bisa Matsayi
communityFeatures.text: Manaja da masu rubutu suna sarrafa shigarwa; mambobi za su iya ganin bayanansu koyaushe.

personalFeatures.title: Rubutun Kashe Kuɗi Mai Sauri
personalFeatures.text: Ƙara kashe kuɗi cikin daƙiƙu — adadi, rukuni, an gama. Babu takardun lissafi.

personalFeatures.title: Kasafin Kuɗi na Rukuni
personalFeatures.text: Saita kasafin kuɗi na wata-wata ga kowane rukuni kuma koyaushe san abin da ya kamata a kashe yau.

personalFeatures.title: Halayen Kashe Kuɗi
personalFeatures.text: Yi wa kashe kuɗi alama a matsayin muhimmanci ko na son rai kuma ka ga halayenka suna inganta.

personalFeatures.title: Manufofin Ajiya
personalFeatures.text: Saita manufa, bi diddigin ci gaba, kuma ka kasance mai himma da bayyanannen layin ƙarshe.

personalFeatures.title: Ƙalubalen Ƙungiya
personalFeatures.text: Ajiye tare da abokai zuwa manufa ɗaya, tare da ci gaban kowa a bayyane.

personalFeatures.title: Bayanan Kai
personalFeatures.text: Ka ga inda kuɗinka ke zuwa da gaske, da kuma waɗanne makonni ko rukunoni suke ƙaruwa.

landing.oneAccountTitle: Asusu ɗaya, ta kowace hanyar da kake buƙata
landing.oneAccountSub: Zaɓi asusun kasuwanci, al'umma, ko na kai lokacin yin rijista — dashboard, matsayi, da rahotanni suna daidaitawa.
landing.accountBusinessText: POS, kayayyaki, kudirorin biya, da rahotanni ga shaguna, 'yan kasuwa, da masu bayar da sabis na kowane girma.
landing.accountCommunityText: Gudummawa, biyan kuɗi, da bashin ƙungiya ga ƙungiyoyin ajiya da da'irorin kuɗi na al'umma.
landing.accountPersonalText: Kasafin kuɗi, halaye, da manufofin ajiya ga duk wanda yake son kashe kuɗi cikin hikima, shi kaɗai ko tare da abokai.
landing.aboutTitle: An yi shi bisa yadda kuɗi ke motsawa da gaske
landing.aboutP1: Moneytracer ya fara a matsayin sauƙaƙan ra'ayi: kayan aikin da ke taimaka wa mai shago, ma'ajin ƙungiyar ajiya, ko wanda ke tsara albashinsa bai kamata su buƙaci digiri na lissafin kuɗi ko takardar lissafi ba. Ko kana gudanar da shagon kayan aiki, ko kana sarrafa gudummawar wata-wata ta ƙungiya, ko kana ƙoƙarin ganin inda kuɗinka ke zuwa, Moneytracer yana ba ka bayanan da za ka iya amincewa da su.
landing.aboutP2: Mun gina shi don kasuwancin Afirka da al'umma tukuna — tare da tallafin kuɗi da yawa a fadin nahiyar, hanyoyin aiki masu dacewa da yanayin intanet mara ƙarfi, da farashi da ya dace da ƙaramin kasuwanci, ba na duniya baki ɗaya ba.
landing.statAccountTypes: Nau'ukan asusu — kasuwanci, al'umma, na kai
landing.statDashboard: Dashboard ɗaya ga duk abin da kake bin diddigi
landing.valueSimpleTitle: An yi shi don ya zama mai sauƙi
landing.valueSimpleText: Babu buƙatar horo. Idan za ka iya amfani da waya, za ka iya gudanar da littattafanka a kan Moneytracer daga rana ta farko.
landing.valueDataText: Kowane asusu keɓe ne kuma an kiyaye shi, tare da cikakkiyar rijistar ayyuka don koyaushe ka san wanda ya canja me.
landing.valueAfricaText: Kuɗaɗe na gida, gaskiyar gida — an tsara shi bisa yadda kasuwanci da al'umma a nan ke aiki da gaske.
landing.pricingTitle: A shirye kake don tsara kuɗinka?
landing.pricingSub: Ƙirƙiri asusu cikin mintuna. Babu buƙatar takardar lissafi.
landing.betaNoticeP1: Moneytracer kyauta ne don amfani na
landing.betaNoticeP2: na farko yayin da muke ci gaba da haɓakawa. A wannan lokacin za ka iya ganin canje-canje na yau da kullum, kurakurai na lokaci-lokaci, ko ɗan katsewa yayin da muke fitar da ingantawa. Za mu sanar da tsare-tsaren farashi kafin ƙarshen lokacin gwaji.
landing.disclaimerText: Moneytracer a halin yanzu yana cikin ci gaba mai aiki (gwaji). Amfani da Sabis ɗin yana ƙarƙashin cikakkun Sharuɗɗan Amfani da Sanarwa, waɗanda suka haɗa da asarar bayanai, iyakokin garanti, alhaki, da warware rikice-rikice.
landing.readFullTerms: Karanta cikakkun Sharuɗɗan Amfani da Sanarwa →
landing.availableInLanguages: Ana samun sa a Turanci, Faransanci, Fotugal, da Swahili.
